description: Ask about a YouTube video or fetch its transcript. Paid per call in USDC on Solana via x402.
name: io.github.pedrot95dev/recapfy

environmentVariables.description: Base58-encoded Solana secret key. Pays per call (dynamic USDC price). Keep it funded; use a dedicated low-balance wallet.
environmentVariables.name: SVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (defaults to https://api.recapfy.ai). For local dev only.
environmentVariables.name: RECAPFY_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to accept self-signed TLS (localhost dev over https only).
environmentVariables.name: RECAPFY_ALLOW_INSECURE_TLS
